name: Spam Breakfast Bagels
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the SPAM into 6 equal slices (3 pieces of 1/4" thickness).
2. In a skillet, sauté the SPAM over medium heat until lightly browned.
3. Remove the SPAM from the skillet and keep it warm.
4. In the same skillet, melt the butter.
5. Pour the melted butter into the beaten eggs.
6. Cook the eggs to your desired doneness.
7. Assemble each bagel by layering the scrambled eggs, SPAM slices, and cheese on the bottom half.
8. Cover with the top half of each bagel.
